prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约12291→14720→18012→18625→20484，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约8193名；2025年基准约20484名，后移幅度较前几 年有所放缓；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2025年分别为548、547、543、543、552人，基本稳定在543–552人区间；2026年计划588人，较2025年扩招约6.5 %，扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第66名，近年排名稳步上升（2021年76→2022年72→2023年65→2024年70→ 2025年65→2026年66），学校综合实力持续增强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第92、评价一般，短视频平台曝光 度处于中等偏下水平，未出现显著报考关注升温信号；应用经济学A+（全国顶尖）、工商管理A、统计学A-，财经类学科实力突出，对高分考生有较强吸引力。 金融/财经/经济类专业2024年热度评估为分化观望（小幅升温），社会讨论趋于理性；会计/财务/审计类评估为推荐；计算机/电子信息类持续高热推荐。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 西南财经大学位于四川省成都市，为本省考生提供了地域便利性；该校在四川省招生计划占比较高，2025年物理类552人、历史类186人，本省考生报考意 愿较强；四川省2026年普通高考总人数约53.5万，较2025年（约46.3万）增长约15.6%，按比例估算物理类考生约32.9万（+15.6%），竞争基数显著扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年扩招约6.5%的缓解效应、本省考生总数增长约15.6%带来的竞争加剧、学校排名稳步上升的吸引力，以及财经类专 业热度分化观望的背景下，预计2026年理科/物理类最低位次在2025年20484名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约21336名，区间20836–21836名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 12291 → 14720 → 18012 → 18625 → 20484, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 8193 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 20484, with a slower pace of backward shift compared to previous years; the provincial science/physics enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 548, 547, 543, 543, and 552 respectively, basically stable in the 543–552 range; the 2026 plan is 588, an increase of about 6.5% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 66th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a steady rise in recent years (76 in 2021 → 72 in 2022 → 65 in 2023 → 70 in 2024 → 65 in 2025 → 66 in 2026), indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd with average reviews, short video platform exposure is at a medium-low level, with no significant signs of increased application attention; Applied Economics is A+ (top in the country), Business Administration is A, Statistics is A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring students. The 2024 heat assessment for finance/financial economics/economics majors is differentiated and wait-and-see (slight warming), with social discussions becoming more rational; accounting/finance/auditing majors are assessed as recommended; computer/electronic information majors continue to be highly recommended.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, providing regional convenience for local candidates; the university has a relatively high enrollment plan proportion in Sichuan Province, with 552 physics category and 186 history category students in 2025, indicating strong willingness of local candidates to apply; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Sichuan Province in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (about 463,000), with an estimated 329,000 physics category candidates (+15.6%), significantly expanding the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the mitigating effect of about 6.5% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to about 15.6% increase in total provincial candidates, the attractiveness of steadily rising school rankings, and the differentiated wait-and-see heat of finance and economics majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for science/physics category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 20484; the predicted minimum ranking is about 21336, with a range of 20836–21836.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 20836–21836, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Statistics, Computer, Actuarial Science, Accounting CPA Direction) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Smart Finance and Blockchain Finance, Top-Notch Classes) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Insurance Direction, Business Administration) as a safety net. When the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; when the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, prioritize Tier 2 majors with higher employment certainty.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2225 → 2428 → 2502 → 2509 → 3048, showing an overall backward trend. In 2025, it shifted back by about 539 places compared to 2024, with a significantly increased magnitude. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 225, 224, 200, 195, and 186 respectively, showing a continuous reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 156, a reduction of about 16.1% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large reduction and will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 66th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a steady rise in recent years and continuously strengthening comprehensive strength. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion events. Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd, with average reviews, showing no significant signs of increased application attention. Applied Economics is A+ (top in the country), Business Administration is A, and Statistics is A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity assessment for finance/economics/economy majors is divided and wait-and-see (slight warming); law is assessed as divided and wait-and-see; accounting/finance/auditing is assessed as recommended. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Sichuan Province in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (about 463,000). By proportion, it is estimated that there are about 206,000 history category candidates (+15.6%), significantly expanding the competition base. Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, providing regional convenience for local candidates; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Sichuan Province continues to shrink, and the competition pressure for local candidates increases year by year.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the intensifying effect of a significant 16.1% enrollment reduction in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 15.6% increase in the total number of local candidates, and the attractiveness of the school's steadily rising ranking, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category in 2026 will move forward (the ranking number decreases due to the enrollment reduction effect) from the 2025 ranking of 3048, but the significant increase in candidates partially offsets the enrollment reduction effect. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2783, with a range of 2283–3283.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2283–3283, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Law Dual Degree, Public Finance, Accounting School categories) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Finance Innovation Experimental Class, Accounting CPA Direction, Economics Base Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Insurance Direction, Economics and Trade) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, prioritize Tier 2 majors with high employment certainty, such as accounting/auditing directions.
